title: NeuroEDDU protocols_iPSC culture_interactive protocol
author: Chen, Xiuqing
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol uses a clickable interactive interface to describe how to: 

 
	 Culture human induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) in mTeSR1 or Essential 8 media 
	 Freeze cryovials of iPSCs
steps_raw:
